overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition showing the player character CJ jogging along the Santa Maria Beach boardwalk on a sunny afternoon. The character moves from a concrete structure past palm-lined wooden walkways with ocean views, transitioning into an urban beach plaza area.

events.description: character moves from concrete building area onto open wooden boardwalk with blue railing

agents.ego_description: running along the wooden boardwalk away from the concrete structure toward the beach

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark suit walking in opposite direction along the boardwalk

entered.detail: Large beige concrete building with geometric block architecture
Light brown wooden plank walkway extending along the beach
Bright blue metal fence separating boardwalk from beach drop-off
Tall palm trees with green fronds lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a large concrete structure on Santa Maria Beach. The character runs onto a wooden boardwalk lined with palm trees on the right and a distinctive blue metal railing on the left. The scene transitions from the building shadow to open sunlit boardwalk as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach boardwalk with ocean views and lifeguard towers

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the curving boardwalk path

agents.ego_description: jogging along the boardwalk passing other pedestrians and benches overlooking the beach

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench facing the ocean

entered.detail: Calm blue ocean water visible beyond the sandy beach
White lifeguard station with blue roof on the sand
Simple wooden park bench with metal supports
Wide expanse of tan sand between the boardwalk and ocean

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk opens up to reveal panoramic ocean views with a lifeguard tower visible on the beach. The character continues running past pedestrians and benches, with the blue railing receding into the distance on the left. The beach sand stretches out to the right toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved boardwalk transitioning to urban plaza

events.description: boardwalk transitions from wooden planks to paved concrete surface

agents.ego_description: following the curved boardwalk path around the beachfront toward the urban area

entered.detail: Open paved area with smooth concrete surface and curved walls
Multi-story contemporary building with glass windows

segments.scene_description: The path curves right, transitioning from the open beach to a more developed plaza area. The wooden boardwalk gives way to concrete paving as modern buildings appear on the right. The beach and lifeguard tower move to the left and recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach plaza with palm trees and concrete structures

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza area toward the buildings and palm tree grove

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the concrete path near the retaining wall

entered.detail: Low curved concrete wall with yellow painted trim line

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an urbanized beach plaza with concrete surfaces, curved retaining walls, and dense palm tree clusters. Modern buildings line the right side while the wooden boardwalk section remains visible to the left. The ocean is no longer in view as the character heads inland through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal boardwalk that gradually transitions from an open beach vista into a developed urban plaza. It begins in the shadow of a large concrete structure, moving onto a sunlit wooden boardwalk lined with palm trees and a blue metal railing. As the character runs forward, the view expands to reveal a panoramic ocean horizon and a distant lifeguard tower before the path curves right, shifting the terrain from wooden planks to concrete paving. The scene then opens into a modern plaza area where the beach recedes into the background and is replaced by contemporary buildings and curved retaining walls. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the urbanized space through dense clusters of palm trees, leaving the ocean behind as the character heads inland.
